ops.body: W5 shipped as e706e1a4 and W6 as f729e99b (both CI green). W5: collapse branch → loud invariant assert with reversion + metamorphic tripwires; band direction verified matching doctrine (2.1M pairs, 3000 fuzz populations, zero violations); cash-axis ruling re-affirmed guard-free. W6: ranking-lanes doctrine superseded by 2954567a (guard, per-code participation, deterministic tier source + trigger, corrected tie-break wording, single-axis banding pin, hybrids-never-band asymmetry recorded); fdd212c hard set concretized + verified; walker handoff dbf3f3ee verified; cash-axis note 2b2b9d3 re-anchored; W1–W5 rejected-findings rebuttals recorded as note 4ed3176; CHANGELOG carries the full wave record under [Unreleased] (slop-cop triaged). Phase-2/3 handoff docs deliberately left DRIFTED — they are historical records of superseded phase states, and blind re-verification would assert current accuracy falsely. W7 capstone in flight: canonical business ask re-declared on the demo trip, sweeps re-stamped (fingerprint formula changed, data did not), bridge/expand/assess/rank/finalize re-run at zero seats.aero quota, board.webp re-capture.
